title: The Devil's Cargo
writer: Charles E. Whittaker, Andrew Percival Younger
actors: Wallace Beery, Pauline Starke, Claire Adams
plot: Arriving in Sacramento during the Gold Rush of 1849, John Joyce becomes the editor of a newspaper that crusades stridently for the reformation of the manners and morals of Sacramento's citizens. John meets Faro Sampson, whom he be...
